falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (key resistance level) for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish breakout contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 (current score: 41) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme momentum divergence, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a potential blowoff top rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Nasdaq 100 drops below 12,000 (78% Fibonacci retracement level from 2024 high) and stays there for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would falsify the pattern match to 'bottom_2024_aug' by confirming a deeper correction than anticipated, contradicting the current 'HOLD' signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
